title: Review: bridges/wasm/ffi round 19
notes:
Maintainer risk: HIGH — P0 bugs in bridge-jmap (infinite retry loop, restart replay flood), bridge-slack (replay guard logic error), bridge-teams (silent message loss returning 200), bridge-matrix (empty bot_localpart echo loop, brittle homeserver domain extraction), wasm (WebSocket leak on reconnect, double-connect), ffi (background task panic hangs Dart forever)
Confidence: 20% chance of missed bug. Uncertainty: JMAP pagination edge cases, FRB Dart-side ownership semantics not reviewed, browser WebSocket GC timing. Would raise with: mock-JMAP integration tests, Dart concurrent disconnect tests, browser WasmTransport reconnect tests.
